description_long: This is a rugged, ankle-high slip-on boot with a matte, dark gray leather exterior and elastic side panels for easy wearing. The boot features two prominent pull tabs at the front and back, both showing signs of fraying and wear, and a visible tan-brown lining inside the collar. The sole is thick and robust, designed for durability and traction, with a slightly raised heel and a textured tread. The leather upper displays creases and scuffs, indicating frequent use, while the elastic side panels are dark and tightly stitched. The overall silhouette is utilitarian, making it suitable for urban environments where both comfort and resilience are needed.
description: A rugged, dark gray slip-on boot with elastic side panels, frayed pull tabs, and a thick, durable sole. The boot shows visible signs of wear and a tan-brown interior lining.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, central seam, and frayed front pull tab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elastic panel, creased leather, and thick sole profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel, back seam, and frayed rear pull tab.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the other elastic panel, more scuff marks, and the overall boot shape.
